name: Pegasus
subtitle: Gift for Hercules
rulesText: <Evasive> (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
flavorText: “His name is Pegasus. And he’s all yours. . . .”%—Zeus

name: Elsa

abilities.rulesText: Whenever this character quests, you may exert chosen character. If you do and you have a character named Anna in play, the chosen character can't ready at the start of their next turn.

subtitle: Ice Maker
rulesText:
<Shift> 4 (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Elsa.)
WINTER WALL Whenever this character quests, you may exert chosen character. If you do and you have a character named Anna in play, the chosen character can’t ready at the start of their next turn.

name: Mulan

abilities.rulesText: During your turn, this character gains Evasive.
This character can challenge ready characters.

subtitle: Charging Ahead
rulesText:
<Reckless> (This character can’t quest and must challenge each turn if able.)
BURST OF SPEED During your turn, this character gains <Evasive>. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)
LONG RANGE This character can challenge ready characters.

_namedAbilityStubs.rulesText: This character can challenge ready characters.
_namedAbilityStubs.raw: LONG RANGE This character can challenge ready characters.

name: Simba

abilities.rulesText: At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may ready your other characters.

subtitle: Pride Protector
rulesText:
<Shift> 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Simba.)
UNDERSTAND THE BALANCE At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, you may ready your other characters.
